problem id: 8d20d0ae
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10100001 -> 01000101
  01010111 -> 11000010
  10010101 -> 01000100
  10011010 -> 10000100
  01000110 -> 10000010
  00111101 -> 01000001
  10011011 -> 11000100
  10110011 -> 11000101
  01011100 -> 00000010
  00010000 -> 00000000

query: 01000111
predicted answer: 11000010
